programmes.show_description: Rieker offers footwear designed to be flexible, roomy, light and well cushioned. Following trends in the marketplace, Rieker provides classic footwear to women of all ages.
Tune in to discover Malika Jewellery, a bold new jewellery brand you're bound to love, featuring statement pieces, semi-precious gemstones and more.
Easy care, easy wear, easy elegance in this mix and match collection of unique and versatile pieces created for the smart, elegant, busy women seeking comfort that doesn't compromise style.
Offering great colours, quality fabrics and exciting fashion designs for every woman. Treat yourself and go shopping with Julia Roberts!
Discover Masai Clothing offering designs that combine uncomplicated Scandinavian design with high quality materials to create a wearable, fashionable and comfortable wardrobe for all women.
Join designer Kim Mendelson as she presents her latest lines. Daytime chic to evening sophistication, weekend comfort to party glamour, the Kim & Co collection is designed for every aspect of life.

Elegant, bohemian-style fashion awaits in this show dedicated to the iconic brand Monsoon, who offer you a range of vibrant prints and flattering shapes to give you clothes you'll adore.
Update your wardrobe with classic, feminine fashion and accessories designs from Helene Berman.
Next season's style starts here. Showcasing the very latest in fashion, from fabulous dresses to gorgeous skirts, this show is your ticket to brilliant dressing in a flash.
Join us to discover some of the finest gold jewellery pieces that QVC has to offer. 9 carat, 14 carat, 18 carat; rose and white gold: explore the fabulous varieties of this most classic material.
Fall in love with Osprey London's leather goods in this show, from beautiful bags to wow-worthy wallets. Perfect gifts for loved ones or yourself, you're sure to discover something you'll adore.
Showcasing the best of the new season's accessories - from footwear to handbags and more, get all the finishing touches you'll need this spring and upgrade your look in an instant.
Discover beautiful plants and all the garden essentials you need, from You Garden.

Step out in style in Skechers! Renowned for their on-trend, sporty designs, you can now find their fab shoes at QVC too!
Discover Apricot fashion, showcasing chic wardrobe staples and elegant pieces to bring your style to life. From fabulous prints to bold pops of colours, discover how you can enliven your look today!
Adesso is a rapidly growing British design-led brand offering fun and fabulous ladies footwear. If you love colour and want something that little bit different, you'll love Adesso.
Discover Ichi's creative fashion to uplift your wardrobe! Showcasing hand-drawn prints, bold designs and exceptional craftsmanship, Ichi will transform your look in a matter of moments. Find out how.
Discover QVC Brand Ambassador Ruth Langsford's eponymous fashion range featuring a capsule collection of classic basics, plus all the essentials you'll need for your next holiday.
